title: Sortable and selectable data table component with pagination
purpose: Provides a reusable table component that supports sorting, row selection, pagination, and responsive design with dark mode support.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named Table that accepts various props for configuring table behavior including sorting, selection, pagination, and styling options.

steps.content: Initialize state variables for sorting, pagination, and row selection.
Sort the rows based on the current sort column and direction.
Paginate the sorted rows according to the current page and page size.
Render the table header with column labels and sort icons.
Render the table body with rows and handle row selection.
Display pagination controls when data is paginated and has multiple pages.
Check if rows exist and are an array.
IF sorting is not active, return rows as-is.
Create a copy of rows and sort them based on the current sort column and direction.
Handle null or undefined values during sorting.
Perform string comparison for string values.
Perform numeric comparison for non-string values.
IF pagination is disabled, return sorted rows as-is.
Calculate the start and end indices for the current page.
Slice the sorted rows to return only the current page's data.
IF sorting is disabled, return early.
Determine the new sort direction based on the current column and direction.
Update the sort column and direction state variables.
Call the onSort prop with the column key and new direction.
Create a new set of selected row indices.
IF the select all checkbox is checked, add all visible row indices to the set.
Update the selected rows state with the new set.
Create a copy of the current selected rows set.
IF the row is already selected, remove it from the set.
ELSE add the row to the set.
Update the selected rows state with the modified set.
Call the onRowSelect prop with the row index and selection status.
IF the column is not currently sorted, return a generic sort icon.
IF the sort direction is ascending, return an ascending sort icon.
ELSE return a descending sort icon.
